_meta._comment: Sidecar for FAILURE_MODES. Build-time generator scripts/generate-audit-content.js reads this file and emits src/lib/audit-content.generated.ts. To add a new failure mode: add an entry here, run prebuild — no source code changes needed.
_meta._format: key = stable id (lowercase-kebab), value = { mode, trigger, impact, mitigation, detectionTime, recoveryTime, severity, order }

git-lock-cascade.trigger: git rebase interrupted + zsh prompt hook fires simultaneously
git-lock-cascade.impact: Total session death — no component can recover alone

shell-hook-deadlock.trigger: Framework guard loops waiting for lock release that never comes
shell-hook-deadlock.impact: Interactive shell unusable; developer forced to kill terminal
shell-hook-deadlock.mitigation: Hook timeout (3s) + force-clean on deadlock detection

framework-guard-loop.trigger: Guard re-enters itself when checking state it modified
framework-guard-loop.impact: CPU spike, eventual OOM kill, no useful work done
framework-guard-loop.mitigation: Guard recursion depth limit (max 2) + circuit breaker

checkpoint-corruption.trigger: Power loss during checkpoint write, or disk full
checkpoint-corruption.impact: Recovery script cannot restore state; manual intervention required
checkpoint-corruption.mitigation: Atomic write (temp file + rename) + checksum validation

failover-target-unreachable.trigger: Both Vercel and GitHub Pages have network issues simultaneously
failover-target-unreachable.impact: Deployment delayed, but no state lost
failover-target-unreachable.mitigation: Local fallback server (next best-effort) + deferred deploy

error-log-saturation.trigger: Sustained error storm fills the 50-entry rolling log
error-log-saturation.impact: Historical context lost; recurring patterns invisible
error-log-saturation.mitigation: Log rotation + summary entry (top 3 errors + counts)
